arts.ttl: Inside Leeds' promotion celebrations: Former Man United youngster in the thick of it with the mic as players party and fans gather outside Elland Road in their thousands
arts.sum: Daniel Farke 's side were on the brink of returning to the top flight following their match at Elland Road on the same day, with the league leaders thrashing Stoke 6-0 just hours before Burnley played.

arts.ttl: Jubilant Leeds secure promotion with 6-0 thrashing of Stoke City and eye Championship title
arts.sum: Leeds and Burnley both secured promotion to the top flight on Easter Monday

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke’s brilliant Leeds United response to Bryn Law’s big title question vs Burnley
arts.sum: Daniel Farke was never going to be a man that would count his chickens in the promotion race, but now that top flight status is secured for next season, the Leeds boss let his hair down. Leeds United are promoted back to the Premier League following an emphatic 6-0 win against Stoke City and Burnley’s win against Sheffield United.

arts.ttl: ‘Back where we belong’: Leeds and Burnley savour promotion heroics
arts.sum: Scott Parker says achievement ‘means everything’ Daniel Farke lauds his side for delivering ‘in great style’ The Burnley head coach, Scott Parker, described his third Premier League promotion as his best yet after taking Burnley up, while Daniel Farke said Leeds are “back where we belong” after securing a top-flight return. Parker has taken Fulham and Bournemouth to the Premier League in previous jobs and will have a third chance to challenge the elite next season after two goals from Josh Brownhill edged Burnley past third-placed Sheffield United to ensure their opponents can no longer catch them or Leeds. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leeds and Burnley secure promotion back to the Premier League
arts.sum: Leeds United and Burnley have sealed automatic promotion back to the Premier League after beating Stoke City and Sheffield United respectively in the Championship on Monday. After beating Stoke City 6-0 earlier in the day, Leeds knew that anything other than a Sheff Utd win in their match at Burnley would seal their top-flight return, while a victory for the Clarets would ensure automatic promotion for both Leeds and Burnley.

arts.ttl: Six moments that mattered as Leeds won promotion
arts.sum: From a slow start to a silent January and changing goalkeepers with seven games left, BBC Sport looks at the key moments in Leeds' promotion campaign.

arts.ttl: Leeds faithful create memories for life with promotion party just beginning
arts.sum: Leeds United will play in the Premier League next season. This is the first time Leeds have gone up the Premier League with supporters present in stadiums since its establishment in 1992.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Marathe promises big summer post-promotion
arts.sum: Today’s clash with Stoke City had the makings of a massive and truly vital game in Leeds’ history, with Burnley and Sheffield United facing each other after. This is the first time in 35 years that we have achieved promotion in person in front of our supporters, so I hope you enjoy every moment celebrating with fellow fans, friends and loved ones.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke already knows Leeds United's main Premier League worry but that can wait for after celebrations
arts.sum: Celebrating at Elland Road after promotion was secured following a 6-0 win over Stoke City and a 2-1 defeat for Sheffield United at Burnley, Farke was asked for his immediate reaction to taking Leeds to the Premier League. Leeds United boss Daniel Farke says the next step after securing promotion is to make the club an established Premier League side, but he admits the prospect of doing so is'scary.'

arts.ttl: When does the summer transfer window open after Leeds United promoted to Premier League
arts.sum: Daniel Farke and Co. will eventually look to strengthen the Leeds squad ahead of the club's return to the Premier League once the transfer window opens. The Premier League confirmed that the summer transfer window will open on June 1 and then close on June 10 to allow clubs to register new signings ahead of the Club World Cup, which is taking place in the United States.
